description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The structure is surrounded by several palm trees, suggesting a tropical or subtropical setting. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, with large window openings distributed across the facade. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by windows and possibly a small porch area. The layout appears open, with multiple rooms visible from above, and the building sits on a flat, paved base. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and open space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior, and palm trees surrounding it. Large windows and a central entrance highlight its open, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pathway, and symmetrical arrangement of palm trees.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the depth of the bungalow, more palm trees, and the layout of rooms extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible back windows and a clear view of the flat roof and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the side facade, additional palm trees, and the building's rectangular shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple facades
